sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n38510" key="e)peisenekte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπεισ-ενεκτέον</orth>, <sense id="n38510.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must bring in besides,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.7.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
